2605.06343.title: Mind the Gap? A Distributional Comparison of Real and Synthetic Priors for Tabular Foundation Models
2605.06343.paper_summary: Tabular foundation models are pre-trained on one of three classes of corpus: curated datasets drawn from benchmark repositories, tables harvested at scale from the web, or synthetic tables sampled from a parametric generative prior. Despite the centrality of pre-training data to model performance, little is known about how these corpora relate to one another in distribution, and the impact this has on downstream performance. In this work we take three canonical, archetypal datasets used to train tabular foundation models; the T4 dataset represents web-scraped corpora, the TabFM dataset curated tables from Kaggle, and the TabICL dataset as the only well-used synthetic prior with publicly available parameters. We characterise each corpus using aggregate features over whole tables, columns and correlations, and compare them using discriminator AUCs and k-NN coverage metrics. We find that the TabICL synthetic prior occupies a narrow region of the space of real tables, that this mismatch cannot be closed by optimising prior hyper-parameters across more than 86 thousand configurations, and that curated and web-scraped corpora are broadly interchangeable on a distributional level in feature space. Surprisingly, the distributional gap between synthetic pre-training data and real tables has a clearly detectable effect on performance under neither feature-based proximity measures or TabICL's own internal representations, suggesting that coverage of the real-data distribution is not the primary driver of TabICL's generalisation.
2605.06343.paper_summary_zh: 表格基礎模型是在三類語料庫之一上進行預訓練的：從基準庫中提取的精選數據集、從網絡大規模收集的表格，或從參數生成先驗中抽樣的合成表格。儘管預訓練數據對模型性能至關重要，但對於這些語料庫之間的分佈關係及其對下游性能的影響卻知之甚少。在這項工作中，我們選取了三個典型的數據集來訓練表格基礎模型；T4數據集代表了網絡抓取的語料庫，TabFM數據集則是來自Kaggle的精選表格，而TabICL數據集則是唯一一個擁有公開可用參數的廣泛使用的合成先驗。我們使用整個表格、列和相關性的聚合特徵來描述每個語料庫，並通過判別器AUC和k-NN覆蓋度指標進行比較。我們發現TabICL合成先驗佔據了真實表格空間的一個狹窄區域，這種不匹配無法通過在超過86,000種配置中優化先驗超參數來解決，並且精選和網絡抓取的語料庫在特徵空間的分佈層面上是廣泛可互換的。令人驚訝的是，合成預訓練數據與真實表格之間的分佈差距在基於特徵的接近度測量或TabICL自身的內部表示下都沒有明顯可檢測的性能影響，這表明真實數據分佈的覆蓋並不是TabICL泛化的主要驅動因素。
2605.06343.author: Alex O. Davies et.al.
2605.06343.authors: Alex O. Davies, Telmo de Menezes e Silva Filho, Nirav Ajmeri
